CustomField.formula:
IF ( OR(ISPICKVAL(Status, "Closed"), ISPICKVAL(Status, "Published")), IMAGE("/resource/1718352099000/greencircle?", "Closed", 20, 20),
IF( AND( OR( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status, "Closed")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status, "Published"))), On_Hold__c = false, DueDate__c >= DATETIMEVALUE(TODAY()) ), IMAGE("/resource/1718352099000/yellowcircle?", "Ongoing", 20, 20),
IF( AND( OR( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status, "Closed")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status, "Published"))), On_Hold__c = false, DueDate__c < DATETIMEVALUE(TODAY()) ), IMAGE("/resource/1718352099000/redcircle?", "Overdue", 20, 20),
IF( On_Hold__c = true , IMAGE("/resource/1718613658000/onhold", "ON HOLD", 30, 80), ""
))))
CustomField.label: Status Logo
